source_units.role: WordPress database abstraction class, public state, query execution, escaping, field processing, charset/collation, table-prefix, and native mysqli boundaries
Global wpdb bootstrap wrapper that loads class-wpdb.php and instantiates $wpdb
Database bootstrap helpers require_wp_db() and wp_set_wpdb_vars()
esc_sql() public escaping facade backed by the global wpdb instance
dbDelta(), maybe_create_table(), maybe_add_column(), and make_db_current() schema-upgrade helpers
Legacy guarded maybe_create_table() and maybe_add_column() install helpers
Core schema provider used by make_db_current() and dbDelta() upgrade flows
Option, transient, and site-option storage paths whose WPHX-304 fixtures currently use deterministic wpdb doubles

native_boundaries.reason: Runtime query execution, connection state, escaping, and server capability discovery cross into PHP mysqli and an actual MySQL-compatible server.
WordPress allows a custom wp-content/db.php drop-in or replacement global $wpdb object. Public ABI and generated PHP must preserve that replacement seam.
The unavailable-database path emits headers and HTML. Port candidates should isolate display side effects behind a narrow boundary.

deferred_cross_domain_behaviors.reason: Meta SQL assembly and cache invalidation consume wpdb but belong with their domain query APIs after the database core fixture harness is stable.
High-level query builders are database consumers with their own public contracts, SQL clauses, cache behavior, and fixture suites.
Multisite table creation, network bootstrap, and sitemeta storage depend on the WPHX-305 database core plus multisite routing state.

domains.label: wpdb class, constants, public state, magic access, errors, and timing
Database bootstrap, connection, server capability, and unavailable database boundaries
SQL preparation, placeholders, identifier quoting, and escaping
Query execution, result retrieval, public result state, and query logging
Insert, replace, update, delete, field formats, and invalid text guards
Charset, collation, safe-collation checks, and invalid text stripping
Table lists, prefixes, blog switching, and multisite table state
dbDelta, table creation, column creation, and current schema helpers
Option, transient, and site-option storage paths that consume wpdb

first_fixture_targets.oracle_focus: Placeholder parsing, %i identifier quoting, by-reference mutation, esc_sql facade behavior, and mysqli-native escape boundaries
SELECT and non-SELECT query state, object/array result shapes, last_result/num_rows/rows_affected mutation, and error reporting
Write SQL generation, format coercion, NULL handling, invalid text guards, affected rows, and insert_id state
Charset/collation negotiation, server capability probes, table metadata, prefix mutation, and multisite table lists
Schema upgrade helpers plus real database-backed option/transient paths that WPHX-304 isolated behind deterministic wpdb doubles
